---
title: "Build WC Match Data"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = TRUE, warning = TRUE)
here <- if (file.exists("reports/_setup.R")) "reports" else if (file.exists("_setup.R")) "." else ".."
source(file.path(here, "_setup.R"))
load_project(root = normalizePath(file.path(here, ".."), mustWork = FALSE))
```

## Configuration

```{r config}
config <- load_match_config()
config
```

## Build dataset

```{r build}
match_ids <- config$development$sample_match_ids
assigned_pending <- purrr::map_int(config$assigned, "statsbomb_id")

message("Building development matches: ", paste(match_ids, collapse = ", "))
message(
  "Assigned (pending) matches: ",
  paste(assigned_pending, collapse = ", ")
)

wc_matches <- build_all_matches(
  match_ids = match_ids,
  save_path = file.path(get_processed_dir(), "wc_matches.rda")
)
```

## Summary â€” Germany vs CuraĂ§ao (`4036731`)

```{r summary}
primary_id <- config$development$primary_match_id

wc_matches$meta %>%
  filter(match_id == primary_id)

wc_matches$events %>%
  filter(match_id == primary_id) %>%
  count(type_name, sort = TRUE) %>%
  head(10)

shots_goals <- compute_team_shots_goals(
  wc_matches$events,
  match_id = primary_id
)
shots_goals
```

Saved object: `data/processed/wc_matches.rda`
